data.title: Ethereum Dominates 2025: DeFi TVL Tops $99B, Stablecoin Volume Hits $18.8T

data.title: United States authorities recover $200,000 from Bitcoin ATM scammers
data.description:
United States authorities in Louisiana have announced the recovery of $200,000 from Bitcoin ATM scammers targeting elderly victims. According to reports, the efforts of the scammers were thwarted thanks to a recently passed Louisiana law that is now making it harder for crypto scammers to steal and get away with funds belonging to elderly residents. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-authorities-recover-200000-bitcoin/

data.title: Strategy’s 673K BTC Treasury is Designed to Survive Market Extremes – Expert
data.description:
Key Insights: Strategy stock is designed to survive market extremes, as per a recent analysis by economics author Adam Livingston. As of January 4, 2026, the firm holds 673,783 Bitcoin. The expert noted Strategy’s 673,783 BTC holdings provide sufficient reserve as a buffer for meeting the treasury’s dividend demands
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2026/01/10/strategys-673k-btc-treasury-is-designed-to-survive-market-extremes-expert/

data.title: Large BTC holders cut holdings by 220K BTC, onchain data shows
data.description:
Large Bitcoin holders with holdings between 1,000 and 10,000 BTC have reduced their holdings by 220k BTC in the last year.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/large-btc-holders-cut-holdings-by-220k-btc/

data.title: Dolphins Accumulate as Whales Distribute, Signaling a Structural Shift in Bitcoin Demand
data.description:
According to data shared by CryptoQuant, on-chain behavior over the past year shows a clear redistribution of Bitcoin supply between different investor cohorts. The chart highlights a growing divergence: mid-sized holders, commonly referred to as dolphins, are steadily accumulating Bitcoin, while large holders, or whales, are gradually reducing exposure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/dolphins-accumulate-as-whales-distribute-signaling-a-structural-shift-in-bitcoin-demand/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 910 USDT with a 1.29% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 10, 2026, 15:36 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 910 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 910.340027 USDT, with a narrowed 1.29% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: OKX will launch FOGO (Fogo) pre-market perpetual contracts.

data.title: Donald Trump Floats 10% Credit Card Rate Cap as Banks Warn of Fallout
data.description:
Donald Trump has unveiled a proposal to impose a one-year cap of 10% on credit card interest rates, with the measure set to take effect on January 20, 2026, marking the first anniversary of his second inauguration. The announcement has immediately reignited debate over consumer protection, executive authority, and the potential impact on credit markets.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/donald-trump-floats-10-credit-card-rate-cap-as-banks-warn-of-fallout/

data.title: Tokenized Treasuries skyrocketed 125%, creating this “programmable cash” loop that banks are scrambling to copy
data.description:
Tokenized real-world assets reached $19. 72 billion on Jan. 9, the closest the market has come to the $20 billion threshold. That figure measures distributed assets, which are tokens that circulate on-chain and can be transferred between user wallets
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tokenized-treasuries-skyrocketed-125-creating-a-specific-programmable-cash-loop-that-traditional-banks-are-now-scrambling-to-copy/
